description.sv: Tempurafriterad marinerad scampi, ris, salladsmix, avokado, lime, koriander, mango, granatäpple, friterad lök & ananas-kokoschutney.
description.en: Tempura-fried marinated scampi, rice, salad mix, avocado, lime, coriander, mango, pomegranate, fried onion & pineapple-coconut chutney.
